events.title: Israel launches deadly strikes on Lebanon's Tyre
events.desc: Israel struck the historic port city of Tyre in southern Lebanon, resulting in at least eight deaths according to the Lebanese health ministry. This escalation follows an unprecedented Israeli evacuation order for the entire city, with the deaths occurring from a single strike on the city's eastern edge. These attacks mark one of the deadliest Israeli raids on Tyre since the conflict with Hezbollah began on March 2.

events.title: Russian attacks kill 5 in Ukraine’s Zaporizhzhia
events.desc: Surveillance camera footage captured the moment a Russian drone strike caused a significant blast in Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine. This attack resulted in the deaths of five individuals and highlights the ongoing kinetic conflict in the region.

events.title: Israel attacks Tyre in Lebanon, warns residents
events.desc: Israel launched attacks on Tyre in southern Lebanon and issued an evacuation order for all residents. The strikes are part of the ongoing conflict between Israel and Hezbollah, with significant casualties reported.

events.title: US leads record rise in spending on nuclear arsenals
events.desc: A report by the International Campaign to Abolish Nuclear Weapons indicates that global spending on nuclear weapons rose by nearly 20% in 2025, reaching $119 billion. The United States accounted for a significant portion of this increase, marking the highest expenditure on nuclear arsenals since 2020.

events.title: US and Iran exchange strikes in Gulf
events.desc: The US military conducted strikes on Iranian drones and radar sites in the Persian Gulf. In response, Iran claims to have targeted US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain, indicating a continued escalation of hostilities despite a ceasefire.

events.title: Lebanese general among three soldiers killed in Israeli attack
events.desc: An Israeli attack on a car in southern Lebanon resulted in the deaths of three soldiers, including a Lebanese general. The Israeli military is currently investigating the incident amid ongoing clashes with Hezbollah.

events.title: Israeli strikes kill 11 people in Gaza City
events.desc: Medics reported that Israeli airstrikes on four residential buildings in Gaza City killed 11 people, including women and children. The Israeli military stated that the operation targeted four Hamas security officials.

events.title: One killed and dozens injured in Iranian drone strikes on Kuwait airport
events.desc: Iran claimed responsibility for drone strikes on Kuwait airport, stating the attack was retaliation for earlier US strikes on an Iranian oil tanker and island. The incident resulted in one fatality and numerous injuries.

events.title: Hungarian government passwords exposed online
events.desc: An analysis of breach data revealed that approximately 800 Hungarian government email addresses and their associated passwords have been leaked online. This security lapse affects most of the government's ministries, potentially exposing sensitive information and indicating basic vulnerabilities in their security protocols.
